_meta.notes: Share of 4th-graders scoring at or above 'Proficient' on the NAEP reading assessment. National average ≈ 31% (down from 32% in 2022). Confirmed 2024 values from NCES release: CA=29, GA=30, LA=32, MA=40, MS=32, NC=30, NY=31, TN=32. All other values estimated as 2022 actuals minus 2pp (national decline). Notable: MS and LA improved significantly ('Mississippi miracle' and Louisiana reading reforms).
